subject: Cannot join Zoom meeting — generic connection error
description: Clicking meeting link shows error before video starts; browser join also fails.

ts_steps.title: Check Zoom status page
ts_steps.action: Verify Zoom operational; test from mobile data hotspot to rule out corporate firewall.

ts_steps.title: Update client
ts_steps.action: Zoom → Check for Updates; reinstall from zoom.us if version very old.

ts_steps.title: Proxy and SSL
ts_steps.action: Zoom Settings → Network — configure corporate proxy if required; IT may need allowlist for Zoom domains.

internal_information: Firewall/proxy blocking WebSocket or UDP. SSL inspection breaking Zoom. Compare guest vs corp network.
